Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL EMPLOYEES

Title: Authorizes Michael O'Brien to take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and be placed on the eligible list to be a full-time police officer for the village of Le Roy
Summary: Authorizes Michael O'Brien to take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and be placed on the eligible list for employment as a full-time police officer for the village of Le Roy, in the county of Genesee.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Michael O'Brien to take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and be placed on the eligible list for employment as a full-time police officer for the village of Le Roy
